components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button with gradient and glow on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #10B981 0%, #34D399 100%); color: white; padding: 0.35rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 300ms ease; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3); transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Glass Card
components.html:
Card Title

Card content goes here.
components.css: .ds-glass-card { background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1); border-radius: 1rem; padding: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); transition: all 300ms ease; } .ds-glass-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); border-color: rgba(71, 85, 105, 0.5); }

components.name: Data Input
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; background: rgba(51, 65, 85, 0.5); border: 1px solid rgba(71, 85, 105, 0.5); border-radius: 0.75rem; color: #F8FAFC; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: all 300ms ease; outline: none; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #3B82F6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3); }

narrative.overview: This system is designed as a sleek, glass-like, and data-forward environment for technicians and supervisors. Built on a deep slate/navy background, it utilizes vibrant, glowing status accents and glassmorphism to visually separate critical data layers without cluttering the screen.
keyCharacteristics: High-contrast, glowing status indicators (Red, Yellow, Green).
Glassmorphism for floating panels, modals, and cards.
Dense typography optimized for complex data tables and analytics.

rules.name: The Status Glow Rule
rules.body: Status colors (Green, Yellow, Red) must use glowing drop-shadows when indicating active or critical states to ensure immediate visibility on the factory floor.

rules.name: The Functional Density Rule
rules.body: Body and label text must remain small and dense (0.875rem or 9px) to maximize the amount of visible data on single screens without scrolling.

rules.name: The Glass Clarity Rule
rules.body: Glass panels must always have a subtle, semi-transparent border to define their edges clearly against the dark background.

dos: Do use glowing shadows on interactive or critical status elements.
Do rely on the Prompt font for all text.
Do use glassmorphic panels for modals and top-level cards.
donts: Don't use consumer-like whitespace that wastes screen real estate.
